strengths: All four pairs achieve full EN/ES parity on headings, metrics flags, and internal link counts — cross-language consistency is exemplary.
Interlink density is high and purposeful: each document links to adjacent auth layers (tutorial → how-to → article → checklist), forming a coherent progressive-disclosure chain.
gaps: security-confidence.md (both EN and ES) is missing the `validation=True` flag present in all other Section D docs — the Validation section is absent from this checklist file.

The article pair (practical-auth) has 12 links against a threshold of 6, which is well above target, but it lacks a 'Related links' heading — the article ends at Troubleshooting with no explicit outbound summary section.
fixes: Add a Validation/Validación section to security-confidence.md / checklist-seguridad-produccion.md with one or two copy-pasteable curl commands to confirm the configuration works.
Append a 'Related links' / 'Enlaces relacionados' block at the end of the practical-auth article pair to match the structural pattern of every other Section D document.
